products.name: Shock & Vibration Isolators
products.descriptor: Elastomeric isolators for mechanical shock and vibration damping in avionics and sensors

evidence.snippet:
#### Shock & Vibration Isolators
Precision-formulated isolators reduce mechanical shock and vibration to safeguard avionics and sensors. Each design ensures long-term damping stability under extreme flight and temperature conditions.

products.name: EMI Shielding & Thermal Management
products.descriptor: Electrically and thermally conductive elastomeric gaskets for EMI shielding and thermal protection

evidence.snippet:
#### EMI Shielding & Thermal Management
Electrically and thermally gaskets to help maintain signal clarity by protecting against both internal and external interference, while preventing your sensitive components from thermal run-off.

products.name: Fuel Cell Gaskets
products.descriptor: High-pressure elastomer gaskets for aerospace fuel cell sealing in demanding flight environments

evidence.snippet:
[Products](https://www.greenerubber.com/products/) / **Fuel Cell Gaskets**
Fuel Cell Gaskets
=================
Engineered for aerospace fuel cell systems, our gaskets deliver reliable, high-pressure sealing with advanced elastomers that resist embrittlement, thermal cycling, and chemical exposure in demanding flight environments.

products.name: O-Rings, Gaskets & Seals
products.descriptor: Custom O-rings, gaskets, and seals in butyl, silicone, nitrile, and Teflon® for aerospace and defense

products.name: Sound Dampening Products
products.descriptor: Elastomeric foam and tape noise reduction products for sound dampening and suppression

products.name: Enclosure Gaskets
products.descriptor: Environmental sealing gaskets for aerospace, defense, medical, and industrial enclosures

evidence.snippet:
[Products](https://www.greenerubber.com/products/) / **Enclosure Gaskets**
Enclosure Gaskets
=================
Reliable sealing solutions that ensure environmental protection and compliance across enclosures in aerospace, defense, medical, and industrial applications.

products.name: Rubber Molding & Over-Molding
products.descriptor: Custom precision-molded and over-molded elastomeric components for aerospace, defense, and medical

products.name: Backplane Gaskets
products.descriptor: Slim-profile conductive gaskets for EMI protection and grounding in backplane interconnect systems

evidence.snippet:
[Products](https://www.greenerubber.com/products/) / **Backplane Gaskets**
Backplane Gaskets
=================
Slim-profile conductive gaskets that ensure effective EMI protection and consistent grounding in backplane and high-speed interconnect systems.

products.name: Air Filters
products.descriptor: High-efficiency filtration media protecting enclosures and sensitive systems from airborne contaminants

evidence.snippet:
[Products](https://www.greenerubber.com/products/) / **Air Filters**
Air Filters
===========
High-efficiency filtration media engineered to protect enclosures and sensitive systems from airborne contaminants while maintaining optimal airflow.

products.name: Tapes & Adhesives
products.descriptor: 3M™ Preferred Converter tape and adhesive line for sealing, fastening, and insulation applications

evidence.snippet:
[Products](https://www.greenerubber.com/products/) / **Tapes & Adhesives**
Tapes & Adhesives
=================
[Download PDF](https://www.greenerubber.com/wp-content/uploads/2016/06/3M-Greene-Brochure.pdf)
![](https://i0.wp.com/www.greenerubber.com/wp-content/uploads/2016/06/Tapes_1-e1362071036694.jpg?fit=440%2C296&ssl=1)
As 3M™ Preferred Converter and  St. Gobain distributor, Greene Rubber has a diverse line of tapes and adhesives to solve a multitude of sealing and fastening problems.

products.name: Tubing and Assemblies
products.descriptor: Extruded rubber, plastic, and metal tubing and hose assemblies with optional reinforcement

products.descriptor: High-bond elastomer fasteners for secure vibration-resistant mounting across diverse substrates

evidence.snippet:
[Products](https://www.greenerubber.com/products/) / **Adhesive Fasteners**
Adhesive Fasteners
==================
High-bond elastomer fasteners that provide secure attachment and vibration-resistant mounting across diverse substrates and operating conditions.

products.name: Fluid Seals
products.descriptor: High-integrity elastomer seals for leak and contamination prevention in fluid-handling systems

evidence.snippet:
[Products](https://www.greenerubber.com/products/) / **Fluid Seals**
Fluid Seals
===========
High-integrity elastomer seals that prevent leaks and contamination across demanding medical, industrial, and defense fluid-handling applications.

products.name: Liquid Adhesives, Sealants & Coatings
products.descriptor: Stocking distributor of liquid adhesives, sealants, and coatings for diverse application needs

products.descriptor: Durable high-load urethane wheels engineered for wear resistance and long service life

Urethane Wheels
===============
Durable, high-load wheels engineered for exceptional wear resistance, smooth operation, and long service life in demanding environments.
